ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population in the region */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income in the region */,
  "network_coverage" TEXT /* Percentage of the region covered by the network */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last network audit in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., router, switch, server) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the device is located */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last firmware update */,
  "last_seen_online" TEXT /* Date and time when the device was last seen online */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., online, offline, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_metrics" (
  "device_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device metric record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "dif" INTEGER /* Data in flight (DIF) metric for the device */,
  "idc" INTEGER /* Individual device communication (IDC) metric for the device */,
  "mt" INTEGER /* Mean transfer time (MT) metric for the device */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was collected */,
  "packet_loss" TEXT /* Percentage of packets lost during the collection period */,
  "jitter" TEXT /* Jitter (variation in latency) for the device */,
  "uptime" INTEGER /* Uptime of the device during the collection period */,
  "last_reboot_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last reboot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the alert occurred */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device where the alert occurred */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high traffic, low performance) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, closed, acknowledged) */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for addressing the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region covered by the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, traffic, security) */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
